title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Marines as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You knew this would be my response, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I did respect you... you were a relentless associate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But nothing will sway Lucci when he comes back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahya Hya Hya!! This is gonna be a blast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's just like his bounty poster!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She made a facsimile with her age-age powers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys!! Nothing hurts these things!!! even if they're sliced up or crushed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's why I want you to--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give it your all and hurl me at him full force!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So all we can do is throw you straight at it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give it our all, huh? You asked for it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll leave the bird to you guys then!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Put out the fire and set sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you two were doing it earlier, Cap'N!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
